_doc: GENERATED — do not edit by hand. Produced by ai_offline_export_pipelines.spec_drift.generator from the vendored Nearmap Feature API OpenAPI spec. To customise a description, add an entry to column_metadata_overrides.json with the same key; overrides win at lookup time.

id.description: The Unique ID of this feature.

class_id.description: The unique ID for the class of this feature.

description.description: A description of the class of this feature.

confidence.description: The confidence level for this feature.

parent_id.description: The feature ID of the immediate parent of this feature.  This field is always present. An empty string indicates that the feature is a root-level feature with no parent.

area_{unit}.description: The area of the feature geometry, in {unit_name}. Connected features (e.g. lawn grass, medium and high vegetation, etc.) are clipped to the requested AOI and area computed off this clipped geometry. For connected features, this area will always equal clipped_area_{unit}. Discrete features (e.g. buildings, swimming pools, etc.) are not clipped to the requested AOI, and the area is computed from the entire feature geometry. For discrete features, this area will always equal unclipped_area_{unit}.

clipped_area_{unit}.description: The area of the feature geometry, clipped to the requested AOI, in {unit_name}.

unclipped_area_{unit}.description: The unclipped area of the feature geometry in {unit_name}.

survey_date.description: The date of the survey capture.

mesh_date.description: The date of the 3D mesh used to generate the resource (if applicable).  This field is always present. An empty string indicates that the feature was not generated from a 3D mesh; a date string indicates the capture date of the mesh.

attributes.description: The list of attributes related to this feature.

class_status.description: Indicates if the class is a production, alpha, or beta class.  This field is only populated if the alpha or beta request query parameters are set to true or a preview release is explicitly requested.

belongs_to_parcel.description: Indicates if the feature belongs to a parcel.  This field is only present if the `parcelMode` query parameter is set to true.

clipped_geometry.description: The clipped geometry of the feature. This field is only present if the `parcelMode` query parameter is set to true and the clipped geometry differs from the (unclipped) geometry.

has3d_attributes.description: Indicates if the attribute has 3D attribute data, such as roof pitch and building height.  Only available for `Building 3d attributes` and `Roof 3d attributes` attribute classes, omitted if not available.

pitch.description: The pitch of the roof in degrees.  Only available for `Roof 3d attributes` class, omitted if not available.

height.description: The height of the building in meters.  Only available for `Building 3d attributes` class, omitted if not available.

height_m.description: The height of the building in meters.  Only available for `Building 3d attributes` class, omitted if not available.

height_ft.description: The height of the building in feet.  Only available for `Building 3d attributes` class, omitted if not available.

num_stories.description: Confidence levels for the number of stories.  Only available for `Building 3d attributes` class, omitted if not available.

available.description: Indicates availability of the value of this attribute.  Only available for `Ground height` and `Building pitch` attribute classes, omitted if not available.

value.description: The value of the attribute.  Only available for `Ground height` and `Building pitch` attribute classes, omitted if not available.

ratio.description: The ratio of the attribute component area to the parent feature area.

dominant.description: Indicates if the attribute component is dominant, relative to other components of the same attribute.  This field is omitted if not available.

rccs.description: Top-level ``RCCS`` payload (the OpenAPI spec defines the schema but with no properties — see API team).
rccs._warning: spec schema has no properties; see API team

ratios.description: List of 50% confidence area ratios for each detection class.

skipped.description: Indicates whether the damage classification was skipped for this feature. This happens when the feature footprint exceeds the maximum size for damage classification of 100,000sqm.  This field is omitted when processing was not skipped.

zone_inner_distance_m.description: Inner boundary of the zone measured from the outer boundary of the building footprint (in meters).

zone_inner_distance_ft.description: Inner boundary of the zone measured from the outer boundary of the building footprint (in feet).

zone_outer_distance_m.description: Outer boundary of the zone measured from the inner boundary of the zone (in meters).

zone_outer_distance_ft.description: Outer boundary of the zone measured from the inner boundary of the zone (in feet).

zone_geometry.description: The geometry of the zone, typically a ring or doughnut shape.

defensible_space_area_{unit}.description: Area within the zone that is considered defensible space, measured in {unit_name}.

total_risk_object_area_{unit}.description: Total area occupied by all risk objects in the zone, in {unit_name}.

defensible_space_coverage_ratio.description: Total area occupied by defensible space with respect to the total zone area.

total_risk_object_coverage_ratio.description: Ratio of risk object area to total zone area.

risk_objects.description: List of risk objects detected in the zone.

vulnerability_score.description: A 1-5 score representing how well protected the structure is to withstand hurricane force winds, 5 being best protection and 1 being the worst protection / most vulnerable.

vulnerability_probability.description: The probability that the building will be damaged if impacted by hurricane force winds.

vulnerability_rate_factor.description: The rate we have filed with states that can be used to adjust premium up or down based on the hurricane vulnerability (so a 1.55 for a hurricane vulnerability score of 1 means the insurer can charge 55% more premium due to this score).

fema_annual_hurricane_frequency.description: Annualized average of hurricane events for the census tract the building is located in, according to the FEMA National Risk Index model. Only available for US region.

fema_version.description: The version of the FEMA model from which the data was taken.

defensible_space_weighted_coverage.description: Weighted average of defensible space coverage.

shingle_present.description: Represents if asphalt shingles are detected.

hip_present.description: Represents if hip roof is detected.

flat_present.description: Represents if asphalt shingles are present.

roof_staining_ratio.description: Ratio of roof covered by staining.

roof_rusting_ratio.description: Ratio of roof covered by rust.

worn_shingles_ratio.description: Ratio of roof covered by worn shingles.

missing_roof_tile_or_shingle_ratio.description: Ratio of roof covered by missing tiles or shingles.

tree_overhang_ratio.description: Ratio of roof covered by tree overhang.

roof_patching_ratio.description: Ratio of roof covered by patching.

risk_score.description: Combination of wind vulnerability score and FEMA annual wind frequency where 1 is the most likely to experience a wind claim, and 5 is the least likely to experience a wind claim. Only available for US region.

risk_rate_factor.description: Filed rate factor derived from the wind risk score. This value can be used as a rate multiplier to adjust premiums up or down based on building likelihood of wind claim. Only available for US region.

fema_annual_wind_frequency.description: Annualized average of strong wind events for the census tract the building is located in, according to the FEMA National Risk Index model. Only available for US region.

zone1_roof_present.description: Boolean: 1 if roof detected in defensible space zone 1.

zone1or2_roof_present.description: Boolean: 1 if roof detected in defensible space zone 1 or 2.

log_compromised_structure.description: Log of sum of compromised structure features.

log_staining.description: Log-transformed value of roof staining ratio.

fema_annual_hail_frequency.description: The average annual hail frequency for the census tract the building is located in, according to the FEMA National Risk Index model. Only available for US region.

fema_annual_wildfire_frequency.description: The average annual wildfire frequency for the census tract the building is located in, according to the FEMA National Risk Index model. Only available for US region.

fire_resistant_material_present.description: Boolean: 1 if fire resistant materials (e.g. clay tile) are present on the roof.

roof_debris_ratio.description: Fraction of roof area with roof debris.

roof_with_temporary_repair_ratio.description: Fraction of roof area with temporary repairs (e.g. tarps, plywood).

indefensible_space_weighted_average.description: 1 - (Weighted average of defensible space ratio across zones).

yard_debris_weighted_average.description: Weighted average of yard debris ratio across defensible space zones.

wind_risk_score.description: The wind risk score used as input to the combined wind and hail model.

hail_risk_score.description: The hail risk score used as input to the combined wind and hail model.
